faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. The basic analysis is free, and after watching 1 short ad, you can receive the detailed report for free. No sign-up or payment required.
faq.a2: Your input is never stored on our servers. Photos are analyzed only on your current device, and temporary result data stays only in your browser storage on that device until it expires or you clear it.
faq.q3: How accurate is the Four Pillars analysis?
faq.a3: This service is based on the principles of traditional Eastern philosophy (Three Fate Compendium, Zi Ping's True Secrets, Dripping Heavenly Secrets). Please use it as a reference for fun and self-understanding.
